description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open-plan layout and multiple rooms, including a spacious living area, kitchen, dining room, bedrooms, and bathrooms. Large windows line the exterior walls, allowing ample natural light to enter the interior spaces. The structure features a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade with white and neutral tones dominating the exterior. There is a visible porch or deck area with outdoor seating, enhancing the connection between indoor and outdoor living. The interior is furnished with contemporary furniture and decor, and the rooms are separated by partial and full-height walls. The overall design emphasizes functionality, comfort, and a seamless flow between spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and an open-plan interior featuring a porch and contemporary furnishings.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main living area, dining space, and porch with outdoor seating, showcasing large windows and the open-plan layout.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the rear rooms, including bedrooms and bathrooms, and emphasizes the symmetrical window arrangement along the back wall.
description_view_2: This side view displays the kitchen, additional rooms, and the side entrance, with a focus on the elongated structure and window placement.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the front facade, main entrance, and porch area, with a clear view of the living room and outdoor connection.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows on front and sides
